notes: Existing node at graph/nodes/factions/brotherhood-without-banners.node.md has stub Identity only — this reconstruction provides a full Identity for that node.
No infobox entry exists in infobox-data.jsonl for the Brotherhood Without Banners page itself; the page slug does not appear as a 'page' key in infobox-data.jsonl.

Edges derived from cross-reference evidence: membership inferred from SWORN_TO edges on member character infoboxes (Anguy, Beric Dondarrion, Beardless Dick, Dennet, Boy, Catelyn Stark, Brienne of Tarth); narrative edges inferred from event and character node prose.
backlink-counts.json uses nested structure: data['backlinks']['brotherhood-without-banners'] — not top-level key as mission prompt assumed.
141 inbound backlinks (high); all 10 top_sources were located and contained usable Brotherhood mentions.
Identity is paraphrased from source nodes only; no invention.
Leadership transition from Beric to Lady Stoneheart is well-documented in multiple sources (red-wedding, raid-on-saltpans, sandor-clegane).
Aliases: 'the brotherhood', 'Beric's men', 'the outlaws' — all appear in source prose as referring to this group.
